incident: JVM heap pressure + GC overhead -> Elasticsearch OutOfMemoryError -> node leaving cluster -> cluster RED, 503s on all search shards, amid recurring slow-query distractors

ground_truth.desc: Heap usage rising above threshold (in GELF short_message)
GC overhead warning before OOM (numeric level=3)
Node leaving cluster due to OOM
Cluster degraded to RED with unassigned shards
Search queries returning 503 no shards available
